overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player character walks along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways, passing various pedestrians, futuristic vehicles, and towering buildings with holographic advertisements and industrial piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with industrial piping and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath elevated highway infrastructure, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in bright pink outfit walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: tall red metal wall with large industrial ventilation pipes running along the top and graffiti markings
large circular metal ventilation fans mounted on the red wall
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between the wall and the pedestrian path
large green building with illuminated white KIROSHI signage and Japanese text
overhead highway structure with vehicles passing above the street
multiple holographic advertisement screens displaying animated content on pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, characterized by a distinctive red industrial wall with large ventilation pipes on the left and palm trees lining the path. The Kiroshi building dominates the right side with its green facade and bright signage, while holographic billboards illuminate the center. The player walks forward through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing a woman in a pink outfit.

scene_state.functional_zone: view of sky and elevated infrastructure between buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the elevated highway structure and night sky above
camera tilts back down to forward-facing walking position

agents.ego_description: briefly looking up at the elevated highway infrastructure and sky while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: dark night sky visible between the elevated highway and surrounding buildings
underside of the elevated highway showing concrete supports and metal beams

segments.scene_description: This brief segment captures a momentary upward tilt of the camera to reveal the elevated highway infrastructure and night sky above the street. The view shows the underside of the highway structure and the tops of surrounding buildings before returning to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and ventilation systems

events.description: green sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians, storefronts, and a newspaper vendor

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the industrial ventilation fans

entered.detail: small vendor stand with newspapers and magazines displayed on the sidewalk
digital speed limit sign showing 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and continues walking past the red industrial wall with ventilation fans and a newspaper stand. The Kiroshi building remains prominent on the right as the player passes pedestrians and observes a green sports car driving by. The palm trees from the earlier section are now behind, and the environment features more commercial storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with blue overhead piping

events.description: transition from open street to enclosed corridor with purple walls and blue ceiling infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with fewer pedestrians, passing under blue overhead pipes

entered.detail: smooth purple wall with large digital advertisement screens displaying food items
large blue industrial pipes running along the ceiling of the covered corridor
enclosed pedestrian bridge crossing above the street connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed pedestrian corridor with distinctive purple walls featuring large digital screens and blue industrial pipes overhead. The red industrial wall and ventilation fans are now behind, while the Kiroshi building recedes into the distance on the right. The walkway feels more covered and tunnel-like with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from an open sidewalk beneath a highway into a more enclosed, futuristic pedestrian tunnel. It begins along a path lined with palm trees and a red industrial wall, moving past the green facade of the Kiroshi building and holographic billboards amidst moderate pedestrian traffic. As the camera momentarily tilts upward to reveal the massive underside of the elevated highway and the night sky, the view then returns to street level to pass a newspaper stand and a speeding green sports car. The scene then shifts as the open sidewalk gives way to a more confined corridor characterized by purple walls and large digital screens. Finally, the red industrial elements recede into the distance as the camera moves under blue overhead pipes toward a pedestrian bridge.
